_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
_vkey_authority: program_vkey + bitcoin_relay_vkey are the AUTHORITATIVE deploy vkeys for the committed ELFs; guest_state below is descriptive prose only (it has lagged the fields before). The vkey<->ELF binding is enforced mechanically at prove time by the EXPECT_VKEY / ELF_VKEY_PIN guard in exec-prove.rs (program_vkey) and exec-reflect-prove.rs (bitcoin_relay_vkey), and at deploy time by DeployConfidentialPool's require(vkey == .program_vkey). After any ELF rebuild, derive both vkeys on the prover host and reconcile every field here in the same commit.
_pending_reprove: These committed ELFs PREDATE the CXFER asset-preservation change in cxfer-core (LiveUtxoSet now carries the note asset and commits it into its root; fold_cxfer folds outputs only when every spent note's asset == the envelope's declared asset). The committed source is therefore ahead of these ELFs — the sha256 gate only catches a rebuild, not a source-ahead state. Rebuild BOTH ELFs from current source, regenerate BOTH vkeys, update this file in the same commit, and redeploy ConfidentialPool (BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY immutable) BEFORE onboarding a 2nd Bitcoin-pool asset. A single-asset Bitcoin pool is unaffected (the cross-asset relabel needs a 2nd asset). The reflection guest is additionally source-ahead of bitcoin_relay_vkey independent of asset count: it now DERIVES each CXFER output's outpoint vout from the commitment index (commitmentForUtxo's protocol convention) instead of reading it as a free witness, so the same rebuild captures both changes and the box harnesses no longer stream the per-output vout. ALSO (SETTLE guest + CONTRACT — the AMM constant-product-parity consolidation, independent of the reflection items above): (1) OP_LP_ADD: FIRST mint (empty pool) now sets totalShares = isqrt(dA*dB) and mints the founder isqrt - MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY (the geometric-mean basis, replaces the rLo basis); SUBSEQUENT adds use the min-share rule dShares = min(floor(S*dA/R_A), floor(S*dB/R_B)) computed IN-GUEST via cxfer-core lp_add_shares (the old exact-ratio gate + witnessed dShares/rem were REMOVED — exact-ratio broke incremental adds once a traded pool went coprime). (2) OP_LP_REMOVE: in-guest MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY floor (sp - ds >= 1000). (3) NEW OP_SWAP_ROUTE (op 11, <= MAX_ROUTE_HOPS=4): confidential multihop — one input note through N constant-product exact-in hops (cxfer-core get_amount_out) to one output note; emits one SwapSettlement per hop (reuses the existing settle swap-loop, no new PublicValues field). (4) Per-op DEADLINE on swap (per-intent)/LP_ADD/LP_REMOVE/OTC/BID/route: the guest commits the earliest, bound in each sigma; PublicValues gained `uint64 deadline`. CONTRACT (ConfidentialPool.sol) changed accordingly: initPool(8-arg, funds+seeds rLo+founder-deposit) -> createPair(3-arg, empty lazy slot; first OP_LP_ADD seeds isqrt; reserves backed by the spent notes' escrow, no funding here); PublicValues gained `deadline` + `error Expired()` + the settle expiry check; _fundReserve/_ethReserveAmount/PoolSeeded/the founder-seed deposit path removed. Guest + cxfer-core + contract src COMPILE; node tests green (lp 10, route 5, swap 6, clearing 3, otc 6, bid 8, transfer 4, bid-resting 6); cxfer-core 65 cargo tests. FORGE TEST MIGRATION DONE: forge build GREEN; the mock-verifier suites pass — ConfidentialPoolSwap 24/24 (createPair + first-mint seed + swap/LP/floors), ConfidentialInitPoolGrief 2/2 (empty-slot front-run), ConfidentialPool 84/84, ConfidentialPoolInvariant 6/6 (128k calls each, incl. reservesBackedByEscrow under the wrap->escrow->first-mint model), ConfidentialPoolFuzz 7/7; and ALL 7 *ProofReal suites still pass (42 tests) — they pin the DEPLOYED guest 0x009cb098 + its own old PublicValues layout (verify proof + decode independently of the contract's settle), so the source-ahead deadline field doesn't affect them. The initPool->createPair callers were migrated; the init/grief reserve-guard tests rewritten for the empty slot; the guard tests call createPair directly (foundry expectRevert + internal-helper gotcha). ALSO fixed the parallel session's Mode B breakage that co-blocked the build: ~13 BitcoinRelayPublicValues constructors across ConfidentialPool.t/Invariant/TacWalkthrough needed the 9th `ethPoolReflected` arg (= the attested pool's address). REMAINING to land: regenerate the *ProofReal fixtures for the NEW guest as part of the box re-prove (they currently certify the OLD guest); exec-*.rs harnesses + fixtures (deadline per op + a first-mint lp fixture + a route fixture); coordinated re-prove (rotates BOTH vkeys) + regenerate this pin + all real-proof fixtures + the DeployConfidentialPool/dapp createPair callers; then redeploy with the new immutable PROGRAM_VKEY.
guest_state: Settle guest (cxfer-guest, 0x009cb098): gen-1 op set + OP_SWAP (FEE-ENFORCED: the guest re-derives the deterministic clearing price from reserves + gross flows + fee_bps and rejects any batch whose declared price differs, so the pool fee tier is actually charged) + OP_LP_ADD (V2 min-share rule min(S*dA/R_A, S*dB/R_B), off-ratio-safe, no exact-ratio gate) / OP_LP_REMOVE (in-guest MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY floor) + OP_OTC + OP_BID. pool_id binds the CANONICAL pair + feeBps (multi-fee-tier). Swap/LP/OTC/BID amounts bound by opening sigmas. NOTE: the committed 0x009cb098 ELF predates the constant-product AMM consolidation (isqrt first-mint + createPair, min-share rule, remove floor, OP_SWAP_ROUTE multihop, per-op deadline) — see _pending_reprove (settle re-prove + redeploy required). Reflection prover (reflection-prover, 0x00afe060): full-scan witnessed Bitcoin-state relay, REFLECT-1 conservation gate (NOT yet asset-preservation — see _pending_reprove). Lineage: settle 0x00bb82ef->0x00c11f48 (fee enforcement + multi-fee-tier)->0x009cb098, reflection 0x0099e1c7->0x00687472->0x00afe060 (cxfer-core rebuilds).
